en.hero.title: The next drop is loading. Get in before it's gone.
en.hero.body: Bold prints, heavyweight cotton, capped numbers — no restocks, ever. Spin the 3D tee, then lock in early access before the public launch.
en.auth.combo.title: Login or register for drops.
en.auth.login.title: Login for drop access.
en.auth.register.title: Register for early access.
en.auth.name: Name
en.cart.title: Cart
en.cart.name: Name
en.quality.title: Built to hit different, not just look different.
en.quality.card1.title: Heavyweight blanks
en.quality.card1.body: Structured, soft cotton picked for daily wear, layering and a fit that actually holds up.
en.quality.card2.title: Print-first design
en.quality.card2.body: Every graphic is the main character: balanced placement, sharp contrast, zero clutter.
en.quality.card3.title: Capped runs
en.quality.card3.body: We print tight numbers on purpose. When a drop is gone, it's gone for good.
en.design.title: New graphics. Darker energy. Pieces you'll actually wear.
en.design.body: Every release starts from one idea — a symbol, a mood, a typeface. The goal: pieces that hit on launch day and still go months later.
en.design.note1.title: Original artwork
en.design.note1.body: Every print is designed in-house, drop by drop. Nothing recycled, nothing generic.
en.design.note2.title: Easy to style
en.design.note2.body: Built around black, white and sharp accent graphics that slot into fits you already wear.
en.drop.title: First look before it goes public.
en.drop.item1.title: Oversized statement tee
en.drop.item2.title: Drop-ready accessory
en.drop.item3.title: Next print, coming soon
en.story.title: One obsession: graphics that don't look mass-produced.
en.story.body: BeCa started as a frustration with generic streetwear. Every print is drawn in-house, every run is capped on purpose, and every piece ships from Romania in small, deliberate batches — not a warehouse full of the same shirt.
en.contact.title: First access. Capped numbers. No restocks.
en.footer.tagline: Strictly limited streetwear, made in Romania.
en.account.lead: Your spot for early access, first-look drops and pieces reserved before they go public.
en.account.name: Name
en.account.nextBody: Fresh print direction, capped quantity and first access before the public drop.
en.account.perk2: Private notes on fit, fabric and print direction.
en.account.perk3: Priority on limited pieces when stock runs low.
en.about.hero.title: About BeCa.
en.about.hero.lede: One vision: original graphics, capped runs, made for people who want something the mainstream doesn't have.
en.about.s1.title: Who we are
en.about.s1.body1: BeCa is a Romanian streetwear brand born from a love of graphic design and urban fashion. Every piece starts as a visual idea — a symbol, a mood, a typeface — and becomes a tee you wear with confidence. The brand system and 3D shopping experience were built by Wolfline Studio.
en.about.s1.body2: We don't do mass production. Every drop is capped in number, so what you wear stays rare.
en.about.s2.title: What sets us apart
en.about.card1.title: Original design
en.about.card1.body: Every graphic is created in-house, never pulled from generic stock.
en.about.card2.title: Capped runs
en.about.card2.body: Once a drop sells out, it's not remade. What you're wearing is rare.
en.about.card3.title: Real quality
en.about.card3.body: Materials chosen for daily wear, not just a photo.
en.about.cta.title: Want to be first to know about the next drop?
en.faq.hero.title: Frequently asked questions.
en.faq.hero.lede: Answers to what our customers ask us most.
en.faq.a1: Orders are usually processed in 1-3 business days and delivered in 2-5 business days, depending on location.
en.faq.q2: What sizes do you have available?
en.faq.a2: Most pieces come in S, M, L and XL. Exact stock per size is shown directly on the product page.
en.faq.q3: Can I return or exchange an order?
en.faq.a3: Yes, you have 14 calendar days from receiving your parcel to request a return or exchange, in line with current legislation. Email our support address with your order number.
en.faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
en.faq.a4: We accept online card payment and, for certain areas, cash on delivery.
en.faq.q5: How do I find out when a new drop lands?
en.faq.a5: Register on the site — your account gets priority access to new drops before the public launch.
en.faq.q6: What do I do if the piece I want is sold out?
en.faq.a6: Tap "Notify me when available" on the product page and pick your size — we'll let you know if it's restocked.
en.faq.cta.title: Didn't find the answer you were looking for?
en.support.hero.title: How can we help?
en.support.hero.lede: For questions about orders, shipping, returns or anything else, write to us — we reply as fast as we can.
en.support.before.title: Before you write to us
en.support.before.body: Many questions are already answered in the FAQ section. If you need help with an existing order, have your order number (format BC-0000) ready so we can help you faster.
en.support.merchant.title: Merchant details
en.support.merchant.body: [COMPLETE] Ltd, a company registered in the United Kingdom, Companies House number [COMPLETE], registered address at [COMPLETE address].
en.support.cta.title: Write to us directly
en.terms.hero.title: Terms & conditions.
en.terms.hero.lede: Last updated: July 5, 2026. Using this site means you agree to the terms below.
en.terms.s1.title: 1. Orders and pricing
en.terms.s1.body: Displayed prices include VAT. We reserve the right to change prices and product availability without prior notice, though already-confirmed orders are not affected by these changes.
en.terms.s2.title: 2. Payment
en.terms.s2.body: Payment is made online by card or, where available, cash on delivery. An order is considered confirmed once payment is validated or, for cash on delivery, once confirmed by phone or email.
en.terms.s3.title: 3. Shipping
en.terms.s3.body: Delivery timeframes are estimates and may vary depending on courier and location. We are not responsible for delays caused by the courier or events outside our control.
en.terms.s4.title: 4. Returns and refunds
en.terms.s4.body: You have the right to return products within 14 calendar days of receipt, in accordance with consumer protection legislation, provided the products are unworn and with original tags attached. Refunds are issued within a maximum of 14 days of receiving the returned product.
en.terms.s5.title: 5. Intellectual property
en.terms.s5.body: All graphics, designs and materials on this site belong to BeCa and may not be reproduced without written consent.
en.terms.s6.title: 6. Cookies
en.terms.s6.body: We use strictly necessary cookies only, not marketing or analytics cookies. These cookies are required for account and cart functionality, which is why they do not require a separate consent banner, in line with applicable legislation on technical cookies.
en.terms.s7.title: 7. Changes to these terms
en.terms.s7.body: We may update these terms periodically. The version in force is always the one published on this page.
en.terms.cta.title: Questions about these terms?
en.privacy.hero.title: Privacy policy.
en.privacy.hero.lede: Last updated: July 5, 2026. We explain what data we collect, why, and what rights you have over it.
en.privacy.s1.title: 1. Who is the data controller
en.privacy.s1.body: [COMPLETE] Ltd, a company registered in the United Kingdom, Companies House number [COMPLETE], registered address at [COMPLETE address], is the controller of your personal data collected through this site. For any question about your data, you can write to us at contact@beca-wlf.com.
en.privacy.s2.title: 2. What data we collect
en.privacy.s2.body: Account data (name, email, encrypted password), order data (name, email, phone, delivery address) and payment data (processed directly by Stripe; we do not store card numbers).
en.privacy.s3.title: 3. Why we collect this data
en.privacy.s3.body: We use your data exclusively to process orders, manage your account, respond to support requests and comply with legal obligations (accounting, returns). We do not sell or rent your data to third parties for marketing purposes.
en.privacy.s4.title: 4. Who we share data with
en.privacy.s4.body: Payment data is processed by Stripe, under Stripe's own privacy policy. Delivery data may be passed to the chosen courier to complete delivery. We do not share data with other third parties beyond what is strictly necessary to deliver your order and process payment.
en.privacy.s5.title: 5. How long we keep data
en.privacy.s5.body: Account data is kept for as long as your account is active. Order data is kept in line with legal accounting archival obligations. You can request account deletion at any time, except for data we are legally required to keep.
en.privacy.s6.title: 6. Your rights
en.privacy.s6.body: You have the right to request access, rectification, deletion or restriction of processing of your data, as well as the right to object to processing or request data portability. For any request, write to us at contact@beca-wlf.com.
en.privacy.s7.title: 7. Cookies
en.privacy.s7.body: Full details about the cookies used can be found in the Terms & conditions, Cookies section.
en.privacy.cta.title: Questions about your data?
en.product.materials.title: Materials & fit
en.product.materials.fabricValue: 240gsm heavyweight combed cotton, brushed inside for softness.
en.product.materials.fitValue: Oversized, boxy cut. True to size — size down for a tighter fit.
en.product.materials.careValue: Machine wash cold, inside out. No bleach. Low-heat iron only.
en.checkout.trustNote: Your details are encrypted and used only to process this order.

ro.hero.title: Urmatorul drop se incarca. Prinde‑l inainte sa dispara.
ro.hero.body: Printuri indraznete, bumbac gros, numere limitate — fara restock, niciodata. Roteste tricoul 3D, apoi asigura-ti accesul devreme inainte de lansarea publica.
ro.auth.combo.title: Login sau inregistrare pentru drop-uri.
ro.auth.login.title: Intra pentru acces la drop.
ro.auth.register.title: Inregistreaza-te pentru acces devreme.

ro.cart.name: Nume
ro.quality.title: Facute sa loveasca altfel, nu doar sa arate altfel.
ro.quality.card1.title: Materiale grele, de calitate
ro.quality.card1.body: Bumbac moale si structurat, ales pentru purtare zilnica, layering si un fit care rezista.
ro.quality.card2.title: Printul e vedeta
ro.quality.card2.body: Fiecare grafica e personajul principal: pozitionare echilibrata, contrast puternic, zero aglomerare.
ro.quality.card3.title: Serii limitate, cu adevarat
ro.quality.card3.body: Printam numere mici intentionat. Cand un drop s-a terminat, s-a terminat definitiv.
ro.design.title: Grafica noua. Energie mai dark. Piese pe care chiar le porti.
ro.design.body: Fiecare lansare porneste de la o singura idee — un simbol, o stare, o tipografie. Scopul: piese care lovesc tare la lansare si inca functioneaza luni mai tarziu.
ro.design.note1.title: Artwork original
ro.design.note1.body: Fiecare print e desenat in casa, drop cu drop. Nimic reciclat, nimic generic.
ro.design.note2.title: Usor de stilizat
ro.design.note2.body: Construite in jurul negrului, albului si accentelor grafice care merg in orice outfit.
ro.drop.title: Primul preview, inainte sa devina public.
ro.drop.item1.title: Tricou oversized statement
ro.drop.item2.title: Accesoriu pregatit pentru drop
ro.drop.item3.title: Urmatorul print, in curand
ro.story.title: O singura obsesie: grafica care nu arata produsa in masa.
ro.story.body: BeCa a pornit dintr-o frustrare fata de streetwear-ul generic. Fiecare print e desenat in casa, fiecare serie e limitata intentionat, iar fiecare piesa pleaca din Romania in loturi mici, gandite cu atentie — nu dintr-un depozit plin cu acelasi tricou.
ro.contact.title: Acces devreme. Numere limitate. Fara restock.
ro.footer.tagline: Streetwear in editie strict limitata, facut in Romania.
ro.account.lead: Locul tau pentru acces devreme, preview-uri exclusive si piese rezervate inainte sa devina publice.
ro.account.name: Nume
ro.account.nextBody: Directie de print fresh, cantitate limitata si primul acces inainte de lansarea publica.
ro.account.perk1: Acces devreme inainte de lansarea publica.
ro.account.perk2: Note private despre fit, material si directia printului.
ro.account.perk3: Prioritate pentru piese limitate cand stocul e pe terminate.
ro.about.hero.title: Despre BeCa.
ro.about.hero.lede: O singura viziune: grafica originala, serii limitate, gandite pentru cei care vor ceva ce mainstream-ul nu are.
ro.about.s1.title: Cine suntem
ro.about.s1.body1: BeCa este un brand de streetwear romanesc nascut din pasiunea pentru design grafic si moda urbana. Fiecare piesa incepe ca o idee vizuala — un simbol, o stare, o tipografie — si se transforma intr-un tricou pe care il porti cu incredere. Sistemul de brand si experienta de cumparare 3D au fost construite de Wolfline Studio.
ro.about.s1.body2: Nu facem productie de masa. Fiecare drop e limitat ca numar de bucati, ca fiecare piesa sa ramana speciala.
ro.about.s2.title: Ce ne diferentiaza
ro.about.card1.title: Design original
ro.about.card1.body: Toata grafica e creata in casa, nu preluata din stock-uri generice.
ro.about.card2.title: Serii limitate
ro.about.card2.body: Cand un drop se termina, nu se mai reface la fel. Ce porti e rar.
ro.about.card3.title: Calitate reala
ro.about.card3.body: Materiale alese pentru purtare zilnica, nu doar pentru o poza.
ro.about.cta.title: Vrei sa fii primul care afla de un drop nou?
ro.faq.hero.title: Intrebari frecvente.
ro.faq.hero.lede: Raspunsuri la ce ne intreaba cel mai des clientii nostri.
ro.faq.a1: Comenzile sunt de obicei procesate in 1-3 zile lucratoare si livrate in 2-5 zile lucratoare, in functie de localitate.
ro.faq.a2: Majoritatea pieselor vin in S, M, L si XL. Stocul exact pe fiecare marime e afisat direct pe pagina produsului.
ro.faq.q3: Pot returna sau schimba o comanda?
ro.faq.a3: Da, ai 14 zile calendaristice de la primirea coletului pentru a solicita retur sau schimb, conform legislatiei in vigoare. Scrie-ne la adresa de suport cu numarul comenzii.
ro.faq.a4: Acceptam plata online cu cardul si, pentru anumite zone, plata ramburs la livrare.
ro.faq.q5: Cum aflu cand apare un drop nou?
ro.faq.a5: Inregistreaza-te pe site — contul tau primeste acces prioritar la drop-urile noi, inainte de lansarea publica.
ro.faq.q6: Ce fac daca produsul dorit e sold-out?
ro.faq.a6: Poti apasa "Anunta-ma cand e disponibil" pe pagina produsului, alegand marimea preferata — te anuntam daca revine in stoc.
ro.faq.cta.title: Nu ai gasit raspunsul cautat?
ro.support.hero.title: Cum te putem ajuta?
ro.support.hero.lede: Pentru intrebari despre comenzi, livrare, retur sau orice altceva, scrie-ne — raspundem cat mai repede posibil.
ro.support.responseTime: De obicei in maximum 24 de ore lucratoare
ro.support.before.title: Inainte sa ne scrii
ro.support.before.body: Multe intrebari au deja raspuns in sectiunea de Intrebari frecvente. Daca ai nevoie de ajutor cu o comanda existenta, ai numarul comenzii (format BC-0000) la indemana, ca sa te putem ajuta mai rapid.
ro.support.merchant.title: Date despre comerciant
ro.support.merchant.body: [COMPLETEAZA] Ltd, societate inregistrata in Marea Britanie, numar de inregistrare Companies House [COMPLETEAZA], cu sediul la [COMPLETEAZA adresa].
ro.support.cta.title: Scrie-ne direct
ro.terms.hero.title: Termeni si conditii.
ro.terms.hero.lede: Ultima actualizare: 5 iulie 2026. Folosirea acestui site inseamna ca esti de acord cu termenii de mai jos.
ro.terms.s1.title: 1. Comenzi si preturi
ro.terms.s1.body: Preturile afisate includ TVA. Ne rezervam dreptul de a modifica preturile si disponibilitatea produselor fara notificare prealabila, insa comenzile deja confirmate nu sunt afectate de aceste modificari.
ro.terms.s2.title: 2. Plata
ro.terms.s2.body: Plata se face online cu cardul sau, acolo unde este disponibil, ramburs la livrare. Comanda este considerata confirmata dupa validarea platii sau dupa confirmarea telefonica/pe email, in cazul rambursului.
ro.terms.s3.title: 3. Livrare
ro.terms.s3.body: Termenele de livrare sunt estimative si pot varia in functie de curier si locatie. Nu raspundem pentru intarzieri cauzate de curier sau de evenimente in afara controlului nostru.
ro.terms.s4.title: 4. Retur si rambursare
ro.terms.s4.body: Ai dreptul de a returna produsele in 14 zile calendaristice de la primire, conform legislatiei privind protectia consumatorului, cu conditia ca produsele sa fie nepurtate si cu etichetele originale atasate. Rambursarea se face in maximum 14 zile de la primirea produsului returnat.
ro.terms.s5.title: 5. Proprietate intelectuala
ro.terms.s5.body: Toate graficele, design-urile si materialele de pe acest site apartin BeCa si nu pot fi reproduse fara acord scris.
ro.terms.s6.title: 6. Cookie-uri
ro.terms.s6.body: Folosim strict cookie-uri necesare functionarii site-ului, nu cookie-uri de marketing sau analytics. Aceste cookie-uri sunt strict necesare pentru functionarea contului si a cosului de cumparaturi, motiv pentru care nu necesita un banner separat de consimtamant, conform legislatiei aplicabile cookie-urilor tehnice.
ro.terms.s7.title: 7. Modificari ale termenilor
ro.terms.s7.body: Putem actualiza acesti termeni periodic. Versiunea in vigoare este intotdeauna cea publicata pe aceasta pagina.
ro.terms.cta.title: Ai intrebari despre acesti termeni?
ro.privacy.hero.title: Politica de confidentialitate.
ro.privacy.hero.lede: Ultima actualizare: 5 iulie 2026. Explicam ce date colectam, de ce, si ce drepturi ai asupra lor.
ro.privacy.s1.title: 1. Cine este operatorul datelor
ro.privacy.s1.body: [COMPLETEAZA] Ltd, societate inregistrata in Marea Britanie, numar de inregistrare Companies House [COMPLETEAZA], cu sediul la [COMPLETEAZA adresa], este operatorul datelor tale personale colectate prin acest site. Pentru orice intrebare legata de datele tale, ne poti scrie la contact@beca-wlf.com.
ro.privacy.s2.title: 2. Ce date colectam
ro.privacy.s2.body: Date de cont (nume, email, parola criptata), date de comanda (nume, email, telefon, adresa de livrare) si date de plata (procesate direct de Stripe; noi nu stocam numere de card).
ro.privacy.s3.title: 3. De ce colectam aceste date
ro.privacy.s3.body: Folosim datele tale exclusiv pentru a procesa comenzi, a-ti gestiona contul, a raspunde solicitarilor de suport si a respecta obligatii legale (contabilitate, retururi). Nu vindem si nu inchiriem datele tale catre terti in scop de marketing.
ro.privacy.s4.title: 4. Cu cine impartasim datele
ro.privacy.s4.body: Datele de plata sunt procesate de Stripe, conform politicii proprii de confidentialitate a Stripe. Datele de livrare pot fi transmise curierului ales pentru finalizarea livrarii. Nu impartasim date cu alti terti in afara celor strict necesare pentru livrarea comenzii si procesarea platii.
ro.privacy.s5.title: 5. Cat timp pastram datele
ro.privacy.s5.body: Datele de cont sunt pastrate cat timp contul tau este activ. Datele de comanda sunt pastrate conform obligatiilor legale de arhivare contabila. Poti solicita oricand stergerea contului, cu exceptia datelor pe care suntem obligati legal sa le pastram.
ro.privacy.s6.title: 6. Drepturile tale
ro.privacy.s6.body: Ai dreptul sa soliciti accesul, rectificarea, stergerea sau restrictionarea prelucrarii datelor tale, precum si dreptul de a te opune prelucrarii sau de a solicita portabilitatea datelor. Pentru orice solicitare, scrie-ne la contact@beca-wlf.com.
ro.privacy.s7.title: 7. Cookie-uri
ro.privacy.s7.body: Detalii complete despre cookie-urile folosite gasesti in Termeni si conditii, sectiunea Cookie-uri.
ro.privacy.cta.title: Ai intrebari despre datele tale?
ro.product.materials.title: Materiale si fit
ro.product.materials.fabricValue: Bumbac gros de 240gsm, periat pe interior pentru moliciune.
ro.product.materials.fitValue: Oversized, croiala boxy. Marimea normala — ia o marime mai mica pentru un fit mai strans.
ro.product.materials.careValue: Spala la masina, apa rece, pe dos. Fara inalbitor. Calca la temperatura joasa.
ro.checkout.trustNote: Datele tale sunt criptate si folosite doar pentru procesarea acestei comenzi.
